title: Aéro: speedrun labyrinthe
description:
Aéro Speedrun Labyrinthe is a short third-person speedrun puzzle game set inside a mysterious experimental laboratory.

Play as Aéro, a subject trapped in a strange testing facility guided by Aves, a robotic companion who observes every step of the experiment. Your goal is simple: complete each room as fast as possible, solve the laboratory’s challenges, and improve your best time with every run.

Explore a sequence of experimental rooms built around movement, timing, observation and puzzle-solving. Jump across platforms, activate mechanisms, interact with cubes, find your way through the labyrinth, and search for hidden bonus eggs. Some rooms focus on precision and speed, while others ask you to understand the logic of the experiment.

The game includes:

• A short speedrun-focused campaign

• Around 10 main puzzle rooms

• Bonus eggs

• A best-time system to encourage replayability

• Fully voiced dialogue with Aves

• French and English language options

• Keyboard/mouse and controller support

• A sci-fi laboratory atmosphere with original cinematic sequences

Aéro Speedrun Labyrinthe is designed as a compact experience: finish the experiment, learn the rooms, then replay to improve your time and discover the secrets hidden inside the laboratory.
description_short: A third-person speedrun puzzle game set in a mysterious sci-fi laboratory. Complete experimental rooms, master your route, improve your best time, follow Aves’ voiced guidance, and search for the 12 hidden bonus eggs.
